purpose: Record the bounded theorem note for the exact indexed global-carrier predicate result.

summary.theorem_name: Gap A bounded indexed global predicate theorem

theorem_statement.bounded_statement: Over the 18-row WXYZTI indexed global-carrier witness table, using the direct-or-indexed witness rule, the predicate all_global_witnesses AND zero_twisted_source_row AND (singleton_ZT OR multi_column_TI) selects exactly rows [3,16]. The stable complement predicate all_global_witnesses AND zero_twisted_source_row AND (singleton_TI OR multi_column_ZT) selects exactly rows [4,9,15].
theorem_statement.preimage_formula: all_global_witnesses AND zero_twisted_source_row AND (singleton_ZT OR multi_column_TI)
theorem_statement.stable_complement_formula: all_global_witnesses AND zero_twisted_source_row AND (singleton_TI OR multi_column_ZT)

boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This is exact over the 18-row indexed global-carrier witness table.
This is not yet a full source-derived carrier-to-register map from the 900 carrier.
Indexed witness mode is weaker than direct endpoint equality.
Only 5 columns have indexed endpoint agreement in the current audit.
why_it_matters: The earlier row-local source law now has an exact indexed global-carrier formulation.
The old branch-sensitive survivor is no longer an independent row-level selector in this tested table.
The stable complement is recovered exactly alongside the preimage, which prevents the result from being only a one-sided fit.
The remaining open problem is no longer schema coverage; it is full source-derived carrier-to-register construction.

next_options.name: full_carrier_domain_enumeration
next_options.description: Attempt to enumerate a broader global carrier-domain predicate rather than the 18-row witness table.
next_options.risk: May require a precise definition of the carrier-domain rows before enumeration.

next_options.name: gap_a_boundary_theorem_note
next_options.description: Write the bounded theorem as the current Gap A boundary result.
next_options.risk: Must clearly preserve that Gap A is not fully closed.

next_options.name: carrier_to_register_map_attempt
next_options.description: Try to construct an explicit source-derived map from 900 carrier records into WXYZTI register rows.
next_options.risk: Harder but closest to actual Gap A closure.

claim.short_form: The normalized source law has an exact indexed global-carrier predicate form over the 18-row witness table.
claim.not_closed_reason: A full source-derived 900 carrier-to-register map remains open.
